title: Spicy Gooey Argentinian Cheese Soup
description: A comforting cheese soup with a spicy kick, sweet clarity from honey, and a silky, gooey texture perfect for a date night.

ingredients.name: salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onion, minced garlic, bell pepper, and chopped chili; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in the chicken broth, bring to a gentle simmer, and let it reduce slightly for 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, add the milk and honey, whisking to combine, and let it warm for 2 minutes—do not bring to a full boil.
Gradually add the shredded Provolone and grated Parmesan, stirring continuously until the cheeses melt completely into a smooth, gooey consistency, about 4 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper, serve hot with crusty bread or crackers.
